title: BetterGamma
description: A Minecraft mod which greatly improves how you deal with dark lighting.
body:
# BetterGamma A Minecraft mod which improves how you deal with lighting in dark places.
[![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fb6621b-811a-473b-9087-c8c42b50e74c.png)](https://s.deftu.dev/bisect) ## What features does this mod provide to me? You can toggle a "Fullbright" feature within the config (accessible inside the Mod Menu UI) and by pressing the configured keybind (G by default) There is also a permanent night vision toggle, also found within the config and toggleable using it's own keybind (H by default) ## Why not just use "Gamma Utils"? This mod uses different means of modifying how the gamma is handled, meaning it doesn't "taint" your game's options file.
